name: ExtensionMeasureReport_SupplementalData
title: R5: Additional information collected for the report (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.supplementalData` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.supplementalData` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.supplementalData` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.supplementalData` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.supplementalData` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional information collected for the report (new)
element.comment:
Element `MeasureReport.supplementalData` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.supplementalData` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
For individual measure reports, the supplementalData elements represent the direct result of evaluating the supplementalData expression for the subject of the report. For summary reports, supplementalData is reported as references to contained Observation resources that represent the number of times each value appeared as a supplementalData result for members of the population.

element.short: Additional information collected for the report
element.definition: A reference to a Resource that represents additional information collected for the report. If the value of the supplemental data is not a Resource (i.e. evaluating the supplementalData expression for this case in the measure results in a value that is not a FHIR Resource), it is reported as a reference to a contained Observation resource.
element.comment: For individual measure reports, the supplementalData elements represent the direct result of evaluating the supplementalData expression for the subject of the report. For summary reports, supplementalData is reported as references to contained Observation resources that represent the number of times each value appeared as a supplementalData result for members of the population.
